sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91130" key="pteroba/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερο-βάμων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n91130.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moving on wings</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύμβαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:20:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
